member.name: T:Endpoint
member.summary: Utility class used internally by the sdk.

member.name: M:Endpoint.FromProtobuf(Proto.ServiceEndpoint)
member.summary: Create an endpoint object from a service endpoint protobuf.

member.name: M:Endpoint.ValidateNoIpAndDomain(Endpoint)
member.summary: Validate that the endpoint does not contain both an IP address and a domain name.
member.exception: if both ipAddressV4 and domainName are present
